item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-009","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant clearly rejects the reduction, identifies scheduling as only one component, and frames Kubernetes as a cluster-level application orchestration/desired-state coordination system. It also explains where the user's statement is locally true: Kubernetes does schedule Pods to nodes, but not ordinary OS processes, and this is at the cluster/container workload layer. No '可以这么理解' style concession is present."}
